prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜约第51名（2026年），近年排名稳中有升；2023年有小语种专业位次下降的偏负面信号，近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第21位（较热），综合热度约243万，报考关注度中等偏上；水产A+、海洋科学A+、生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-，海洋科学A+为全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 理科相关专业如计算机类高热推荐、电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程高热推荐，对理科生吸引力强；本省2026年物理类考生约26.8万人，较2025年微增约0.5%，竞争略加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划继续扩招（+6.6%）及本省考生微增，在2025年基准10195名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约10613名，区间10113-11113名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10113-11113名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（10113名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（11113名附近）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 7232 → 7625 → 7010 → 9617 → 10195, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3185 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 10195; provincial enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 64, 75, 82, 85, and 91 respectively, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 97, an increase of about 6.6% compared to 91 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 51st on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable or slightly rising rankings in recent years; in 2023, there was a negative signal of declining rankings for minor language majors, but overall reputation has been stable recently; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, indicating moderate to high application attention; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with Marine Science A+ being nationally top-tier, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Science-related majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering (highly recommended) are strongly attractive to science students; in 2026, the province has about 268,000 physics category examinees, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the continued expansion of the 2026 plan (+6.6%), and a slight increase in provincial examinees, based on the 2025 baseline of 10195, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 10613, with a range of 10113-11113.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 51st (2026), with stable or rising rankings in recent years; in 2023, there was a slightly negative signal of declining rankings for minor language majors, with generally stable reputation in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity about 2.43 million, indicating moderate to high application attention; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with distinctive marine characteristics, attracting some interest for related majors.
